name: Vibration Analysis Log Configuration
description: You are a UAV Maintenance Technician. The vehicle requires a baseline vibration analysis flight to tune the harmonic notch filter. Based on the service bulletin at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/vibration_test_bulletin.txt, configure the five specified ArduPilot logging parameters in QGroundControl and export the complete vehicle parameter list to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/vibration_prep.params.
